meaning: n.朗诵,背诵,叙述,独奏会,独唱会
examples: She learned to play the instrument when she was a small child and gave her first public recital at age 9.
For a single instrument, say something like a piano recital, a room with a short reverberation time is better.
Tickets are sold out for the recital.
Many pupils who were at the original recital are returning to hear it again.
He sang with perfect pitch and had just played at his third piano recital.
